basic_details.job_title: Government Polytechnic Narpala – Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, Office Subordinate – 8 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Polytechnic Narpala Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, Office Subordinate. Candidates with Bachelor’s Degree, ITI Pass, Diploma, 7th pass Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 08-06-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Government Polytechnic Narpala official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree, ITI Pass Certificate with 1 year experience, Diploma with 1 year experience, VII Class examination pass and able to ride a Bicycle

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Government Polytechnic Narpala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Government Polytechnic Narpala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, Office Subordinate Posts
